title: OperationCancelMethod
description: Contract for operation.cancel JSON-RPC method. Sends cancel signal to a running operation.

operationId.description: ID of the operation to cancel

OperationCancelResponse.title: OperationCancelResponse
OperationCancelResponse.description: Result of operation.cancel. Errors: validation_error (1001) if operationId does not exist.

acknowledged.description: true if the cancel signal was sent to a running/queued operation; false if the operation had already finished
